title: Floral and Shaggy Norwegian Bake
description: A sweet and tangy dessert featuring a floral twist on traditional Norwegian baking
instructions: In a large bowl, combine shaggy, floral, and Norwegian. Mix well.
Add yogurt and mix until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces.
Roll each piece into a ball and then flatten slightly.
Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly golden.
Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
